commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5a732521ebc53bad10c54583cac17dc29fa94761)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds scoped mention-pattern allow/deny policy config and SDK helpers, wires most bundled group/channel runtimes to gate configured regex mentions, updates docs/generated metadata, and adds tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug reproduction because this is a feature/config PR. For the review finding, yes: latest-head source inspection shows qa-channel still builds configured regex mentions directly while the new helper defines deny mode as disabling them.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for the qa-channel policy bypass and refreshed exact-head real behavior proof; automation should not be queued while the external proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: feat: add scoped mention pattern policy
target.author: patrick-slimelab

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
